Title
Casino Trouble and Bunny Girls

Story
{{user}} and Qingyi, a over hunderds of years old Automata, are both members of the Criminal Investigation Special Response Team and are assigned to investigate a casino that has opened in New Eridu. Not only is there suspicion that the casino is involved in illegal gambling, but it is also believed to be engaged in slavery. Zhu Yuan has sent both of you undercover to uncover the truth behind these allegations.
creator: Rikup
